ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.East.us2.description: Following world war, London is a police state occupied by a fascist government, and a vigilante known only as V (Hugo Weaving) uses terrorist tactics to fight the oppressors of the world in which he now lives. When V saves a young woman named Evey (Natalie Portman) from the secret police, he discovers an ally in his fight against England's oppressors.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
HBO.East.us2.description: Abandoned by his parents and raised by an aunt and uncle, teenager Peter Parker, AKA Spider-Man, is trying to sort out who he is and exactly what his feelings are for his first crush, Gwen Stacy. When Peter finds a mysterious briefcase that was his father's, he pursues a quest to solve his parents' disappearance. His search takes him to Oscorp and the lab of Dr. Curt Connors, setting him on a collision course with Connors' alter ego, the Lizard.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2

Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.East.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.East.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants out of his criminal life, but that could threaten Claire.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Hidden Figures
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a prison cell somewhere in Latin America, two very different men warily confront each other. Molina (William Hurt) is first seen wrapping his head in a towel, in the shape of a turban, while Valentin (Raul Julia), bearded and classically macho in appearance, watches with a mixture of fascination and revulsion. During the time spent together, the two men come to understand and respect each other.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After Joey Banis is found guilty of the murder of James Carroll, the trial of Jeffrey Mundt begins. Joey Banis's video "confession" is scrutinized and allegedly staged by Mundt. The second trial concludes with a stunning outcome.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Thank You, Have a Nice Day
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A Mexican delivery worker in New York City tries to connect with his daughter while working, and one of the deliveries turns out to be a bitter surprise.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Industry
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: As Tender dominates the headlines, Harper, Yasmin and Henry each face a moment of reckoning.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Going to Mars: The Nikki Giovanni Project
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A look at the life of poet Nikki Giovanni and the revolutionary periods in which she wrote, from the Civil Rights Movement to Black Lives Matter.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Miss Evers' Boys
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When nurse Eunice Evers (Alfre Woodard) is chosen to facilitate a program intended to curb syphilis rates among African Americans in rural Alabama, she is gratified to be able to serve her community. Over time, however, the study becomes twisted into a shocking human experiment in which patients are systematically denied much-needed medicine. Decades after the fact, Evers is called before a Senate committee to testify as to what really happened during the infamous "Tuskegee Study.".

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Bronte novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Edge of the Earth
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Into the Void
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Snowboarders Jeremy Jones and Elena Hight, and skier Griffin Post, venture out on a human-powered ski and snowboard expedition in the icy wilderness of Alaska's Glacier Bay National Park.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Edge of the Earth
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Raging Torrent
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Kayakers Ben Stookesberry, Nouria Newman and Erik Boomer attempt the first descent of the potentially impassable Chalupas River in the vast jungle of the Llanganates National Park in Ecuador.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Edge of the Earth

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Climbers Emily Harrington and Adrian Ballinger attempt to accomplish the first individual free climb ascent of a near impossible route on Pik Slesova in Kyrgyzstan.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Henry Kitteridge hires a new assistant at his pharmacy; Olive and a fellow teacher give a shy student a ride home; Henry goes on a hunting trip; Olive experiences a tragedy.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part 3: A Different Road
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After a dinner with friends, Olive and Henry make a pit stop that takes a chilling turn; Christopher suggests that his parents should get counseling; Christopher confronts his mother about rebuking him throughout his childhood.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Olive goes to New York to visit Christopher, but is put off by his wife's demeanor; Olive receives bad news about Henry; Olive and Jack Kennison develop an unlikely bond.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Brick Mansions
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian Detroit, grand houses that once housed the wealthy are now homes of the city's most-dangerous criminals. Surrounding the area is a giant wall to keep the rest of Detroit safe. For undercover cop Damien Collier (Paul Walker), every day is a battle against corruption as he struggles to bring his father's killer, Tremaine (RZA), to justice. Meanwhile, Damien and an ex-con named Lino (David Belle) work together to save the city from a plot to destroy it.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: V for Vendetta
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Following world war, London is a police state occupied by a fascist government, and a vigilante known only as V (Hugo Weaving) uses terrorist tactics to fight the oppressors of the world in which he now lives. When V saves a young woman named Evey (Natalie Portman) from the secret police, he discovers an ally in his fight against England's oppressors.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Great Lillian Hall
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Broadway actress Lillian Hall pours her heart and soul into preparing for her next big role but finds herself blindsided by confusion and forgetfulness. She strives to make it to opening night while holding on to her fading memories and identity.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Sunshine Cleaning
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. When Rose's married lover tells her about the lucrative field of crime-scene cleanup, she pours all her remaining resources into her new business, and recruits the squeamish Norah to help.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: A United Kingdom
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the 1940s, Prince Seretse Khama of Botswana shocks the world when he marries a white woman from London.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Marie Antoinette

Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: On an empty road in the middle of the night, Shula stumbles across the body of her uncle. As the funeral unfolds, the cousins unveil the buried secrets of their Zambian family in a vibrant reckoning with the lies we tell ourselves.

Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. Jerry will collect the ransom from her wealthy father (Harve Presnell), paying the thugs a small portion and keeping the rest to satisfy his debts. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: It's Complicated
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falling in love with Jane but soon realizes that he has become part of a triangle.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Shoreline Defender
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A heated debate amongst beachgoers and private homeowners emerges on the Santa Rosa Beach shoreline in Florida; in rural Montana, Seth takes issue with a gate placed by new neighbor Josh, who insists he's within his legal rights to do so.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: The Farm
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Exploring the chaotic and complicated disputes of neighbors and the extreme lengths they'll go to defend what's theirs.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Patch of Grass
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In Florida, former friends Melissa and Victoria dispute the rightful ownership of a small patch of grass between their West Palm Beach homes; in Palm Bay, Johnny and Andy's own grass-related feud leads to accusations of stalking.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Opus
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Nut Job
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: After he accidentally destroys the winter food supply of his fellow Liberty Park residents, Surly (Will Arnett), a squirrel, is banished to the streets of Oakton. Luckily, Surly finds the town's nut shop and hatches a plan to plunder its bounty. However, unbeknown to Surly and his ragtag team of animal associates, the nut shop is really a front for mobsters who plan to rob the bank next door. While Surly and his team break in to the shop, the mobsters carry out their own scheme.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Surly the squirrel and his animal friends find out that the corrupt mayor of Oakton plans to bulldoze their beloved Liberty Park to make way for an amusement park. Hoping to save the place they call home, Surly, Andie, Buddy and the rest of the gang join forces with Mr. Feng, a seemingly cute and innocent mouse who happens to be a fierce master of kung fu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Patch of Grass
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In Florida, former friends Melissa and Victoria dispute the rightful ownership of a small patch of grass between their West Palm Beach homes; in Palm Bay, Johnny and Andy's own grass-related feud leads to accusations of stalking.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Patch of Grass
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In Florida, former friends Melissa and Victoria dispute the rightful ownership of a small patch of grass between their West Palm Beach homes; in Palm Bay, Johnny and Andy's own grass-related feud leads to accusations of stalking.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Fay Grim
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Many years after her notorious husband, Henry Fool, fled after killing a neighbor, Fay Grim (Parker Posey) receives a visit from CIA agent Fulbright (Jeff Goldblum), who tells her that Henry is dead, but that some of his journals have been unearthed in France. She sets forth on a globe-trotting odyssey that soon leads to the discovery that he is alive, and his journals are more than they appear to be.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Watch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In Glenview, Ohio, four pals, Evan, Bob, Franklin and Jamarcus, form a neighborhood watch group. Armed with flashlights, walkie-talkies and spiffy new jackets, the guys try to take their mission seriously, even if they spend a little time goofing off now and then. But when they discover aliens living among them and no one believes their story, they learn that they have to kick things up a notch to save the world from annihilation.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Land of the Lost
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A space-time vortex sucks scientist Rick Marshall (Will Ferrell), his assistant Holly (Anna Friel) and a survivalist Will (Danny R. McBride) into a world populated by dinosaurs and painfully slow creatures called Sleestaks. With few resources at their disposal, Rick, Holly and Will must rely on their only ally, a primate named Chaka (Jorma Taccone), to try to survive long enough to figure out a way back home.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks and Dick Cavett Together Again
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The pair reminisce about life and show business on stage at the Saban Theatre in Los Angeles.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Charting Brooks' rise to superstardom and the enduring impact of his work on audiences and future generations of comedic writers and performers.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Dennis Miller: The Raw Feed
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic takes aim at the foibles and follies of society, politics, celebrity and more during a performance in Chicago.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marcella Arguello: B..., Grow Up!
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Marcella's stand-up comedy special at the Roulette Intermedium in Brooklyn, N.Y.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Monster
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A divorced mother and her headstrong daughter must make an emergency late-night road trip to see the girl's father. As they drive through deserted country roads on a stormy night, they suddenly have a startling collision that leaves them shaken but not seriously hurt. Their car, however, is dead, and as they try in vain to get help, they come to realize they are not alone -- a terrifying evil is lurking in the woods, intent on never letting them leave.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of La Llorona
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Give It a Year
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Going the Distance
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: It's Complicated
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Monster-in-Law
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Billie Jean King: Portrait of a Pioneer
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Friends and family giving candid interviews include tennis legends Chris Evert and Martina Navratilova, as well as Elton John, Frank Deford, Ilana Kloss, and King's parents, brother and ex-husband Larry King.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part One
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After the success of "Piano Man," Billy Joel's career takes off with a string international hits and record-breaking tours.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Through countless setbacks, Joel reinvents himself with a return to his roots and a residency at Madison Square Garden.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Color Purple
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Babygirl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Megan Leavey
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sex and the City 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Love to Love You, Donna Summer
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Donna Summer creates music that takes her from the avant-garde scene in Germany to the glitter and bright lights of dance clubs in New York; features never-before-seen home video footage and interviews with friends, family and colleagues.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mavis!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The life, music, and message of singer Mavis Staples.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Whoopi Goldberg Presents Moms Mabley
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmmaker Whoopi Goldberg examines the life and work of stand-up comic Moms Mabley.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Frankenstein 1970
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Insidious: Chapter 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When teenager Quinn Brenner (Stefanie Scott) senses that her late mother is trying to contact her, she seeks help from gifted psychic Elise Rainier (Lin Shaye). However, Elise's tragic past makes her reluctant to use her abilities. After Quinn is attacked by a malevolent entity, her father (Dermot Mulroney) pleads with Elise for help. With support from two parapsychologists, Elise ventures deep into The Further -- where she finds a powerful demon with an insatiable craving for human souls.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Terminator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charting Brooks' rise to superstardom and the enduring impact of his work on audiences and future generations of comedic writers and performers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Pee-wee as Himself
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the 1980s, Paul Reubens becomes a global sensation with his alter-ego Pee-wee Herman, but fame proves to be a complicated companion.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Pee-wee as Himself
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After taking Pee-wee to television, Reubens endures a series of scandals before reemerging as a cult figure and reclaiming his legacy.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Logan
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: X-Men: First Class
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Dark Money Game
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Ohio Confidential
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A political lobbyist is found shot to death; his apparent suicide highlights a turn in Ohio's largest public corruption case; the case gets uncovered by federal investigators and was nearly concealed by loose super PAC campaign financing rules.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Dark Money Game
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Wealth of the Wicked
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tracing the tangled history of campaign finance back to the creation of the Federal Election Commission (FEC) in 1975, the 2002 McCain-Feingold Campaign Finance Reform Bill, and the Citizens United decision of 2010.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Murder in Glitterball City
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The body of James Carroll, a gifted hairdresser and drag performer, is discovered. Details are shared of Banis's and Mundt's relationship, revealing both men as complex suspects. Mundt's testimony against his former lover Banis is damning.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Joker
truTV.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Gemini Man

His plans get turned upside down when he becomes the target of a mysterious operative who can seemingly predict his every move. To his horror, Brogan soon learns that the man who's trying to kill him is a younger, faster, cloned version of himself.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Angels in the Outfield
truTV.HD.us2.description: Foster kid Roger (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) loves the Anaheim Angels, even though they're the worst team in the major leagues. His estranged dad promises to reunite the family if the Angels make it to the World Series, so Roger decides to ask for some divine help and prays that his favorite team will turn things around. Soon, a real angel named Al (Christopher Lloyd) shows up in response to Roger's prayers, and Anaheim's hopeless coach (Danny Glover) is shocked to see his team on a winning streak.

Hummel demands $100 million in war reparations to be paid to the families of slain servicemen who died on covert operations. After their SEAL team is wiped out, Stanley and John deal with the soldiers on their own.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Fugitive
AMC.HD.us2.description: Wrongfully accused of murdering his wife, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find her killer and clear his name. Pursuing him is a team of U.S. marshals led by Deputy Samuel Gerard, a determined detective who will not rest until Richard is captured. As Richard leads the team through a series of intricate chases, he discovers the secrets behind his wife's death and struggles to expose the killer before it is too late.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard
AMC.HD.us2.description: New York City policeman John McClane is visiting his estranged wife and two daughters on Christmas Eve. He joins her at a holiday party in the headquarters of the Japanese-owned business she works for. But the festivities are interrupted by a group of terrorists who take over the exclusive high-rise, and everyone in it. Very soon McClane realizes that there's no one to save the hostages -- but him.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Die Hard 2
AMC.HD.us2.description: A year after his heroics in L.A., detective John McClane (Bruce Willis) is mixed up in another terrorist plot, this time at Washington Dulles International Airport, where he is waiting for his wife (Bonnie Bedelia). That same night, South American politico and drug profiteer Ramon Esperanza (Franco Nero) is arriving in U.S. custody. McClane takes action when a treasonous ex-colonel (William Sadler) seizes control of the airport, threatening to crash every inbound flight unless Esperanza is freed.

AMC.HD.us2.title: White House Down
AMC.HD.us2.description: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only Cale can save his daughter, the president and the country.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Law Abiding Citizen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Clyde Shelton is an honorable family man, until the day his wife and daughter are murdered in a home invasion. He hopes for justice, but a rising prosecutor named Nick Rice cuts a deal with one of the killers in exchange for testimony. Ten years later, that man is found dead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys
AMC.HD.us2.description: Miami-Dade detectives Mike Lowrey (Will Smith) and Marcus Burnett (Martin Lawrence) blow a fuse when $100 million worth of heroin they recently confiscated is heisted from station headquarters. Suspecting it was an inside job, Internal Affairs gives them five days to track down the drugs before they shut down the narcotics division. Action meets farce when Marcus is compelled to masquerade as his partner in order to gain the trust of a call girl (Tea Leoni), a key witness in their investigation.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Bad Boys II
AMC.HD.us2.description: The drug ecstasy is flowing into Miami, and the police want it stopped. Police Detective Marcus Burnett and his partner, Mike Lowrey, are just the men to do it. They track the drugs to a Cuban smuggler, Johnny Tapia, who is also involved in a bloody war with Russian and Haitian mobsters. If that isn't bad enough, there's tension between the two cops because Lowrey is romantically involved with Burnett's sister, Syd.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Italian Job
AMC.HD.us2.description: After a heist in Venice, Steve turns on his partners in crime, killing safecracker John Bridger and keeping all the gold for himself; the rest of the team, including leader Charlie Croker, driver Handsome Rob, explosives man Left Ear and tech geek Lyle, vows revenge; they enlist the help of Bridger's daughter, Stella and plot to recover the gold from Steve's Los Angeles mansion.

AMC.HD.us2.title: London Has Fallen

Without warning, terrorists unleash a devastating attack that leaves the city in chaos and ruins. Secret Service agent Mike Banning (Gerard Butler) springs into action to bring U.S. President Benjamin Asher (Aaron Eckhart) to safety. When Asher falls into the hands of the sinister organization, it's up to Banning to save his commander in chief from a horrible fate.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
AMC.HD.us2.description: Living undercover in Brazil, master assassin Arthur Bishop (Jason Statham) springs back into action after an old enemy (Sam Hazeldine) kidnaps the woman (Jessica Alba) he loves. To save her life, Bishop must kill an imprisoned African warlord, a human trafficker (Toby Eddington) and an arms dealer (Tommy Lee Jones), all while making the deaths look like accidents. When things don't go exactly as planned, Bishop turns the tables on the people who forced him out of retirement.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de muñecos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuando la fortuna te visita
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio compra un boleto de lotería que resulta ganador, pero un accidente lleva a don Gabriel a quedarse con el dinero del premio para salvar la vida de su esposa. Una historia de fortuna y perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi consuegra es una vividora
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María enviudó y su difunto esposo le heredó un terreno a su hijo Edry. Ahora su consuegra Luz lo tiene ocupado, él dejó su sueño de ser boxeador para construirle a ella una casita.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Presente ausente; Amistad violenta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Su mamá muere y reaparece su padrastro quien quiere parte de la herencia. Reclama por una fiesta con sexo, droga y todo tipo de ilegalidades, pelean y rompen una tubería que inunda el edificio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El asesino de mi hermano; Slow fashion
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natasha busca al hombre que mató a su hermano y decide casarse con él para vengarse, sin imaginar que su plan tomaría otro rumbo. Una modelo es víctima de activistas fuera de control.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lazos de mi corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura y Manuel son un matrimonio feliz que vive con sus dos hijas. En medio de un momento difícil para la familia, las dos jóvenes descubren un secreto que sus padres les han ocultado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Barrera de rencor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Jovita le arrebató a su bebé cuando ella era apenas una adolescente. Pasaron muchos años antes de que pudiera reencontrarse con su hija Adriana, quien llena de rencor, la rechaza con dureza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Gabino al borde de la muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El capo queda malherido tras ser atacado en prisión. Lo hacen en nombre de sus socios colombianos, quienes reclaman su deuda. Joselito lo quiere muerto. Fernanda llega a casa de Diego.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Objetivos no logrados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las amigas Ana y Carmen vienen para llevarse una sala de entretenimiento, pero en la segunda pregunta la situación cambia. Sandra y Jaime tienen una meta: multiplicar los premios al doble.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bella prostituta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Zarina demanda a Sistina por exponerla a una red de prostitución tras firmar un contrato como modelo internacional. Uno de los socios la violó y torturó. Ellos alegan que nadie la obligó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Premier League: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la información que buscas antes y después de cada jornada en Premier League: análisis previo, datos clave, protagonistas y el mejor repaso tras los partidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Premier League
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 29 de la temporada 2025-2026 de la Premier League. Tottenham se enfrenta a Crystal Palace Desde el estadio Tottenham Hotspur.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El juez
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marcos debe enfrentar la verdad y honrar su ética profesional antes de partir. Ser juez y parte va contra la ley, pero el dolor por una hija nubla la línea entre justicia y venganza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mientras yo rezaba, vació la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En medio de la cremación de su madre, Monse acusa a su hermana de saquear las pertenencias sin respetar la herencia. Asegura que no ayudó con los gastos del funeral ni acudió a despedirse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me cobra la renta en mi cuarto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Karla afirma que Guillermo y Paola la quieren desalojar, aunque quiera pagar la renta. El joven busca una relación seria con su nueva inquilina, pero no puede sacarse de encima a la otra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Prima ALS; La desgracia de la familia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis acogió a su prima en su casa, pero la jovencita está descontrolada, su esposa le pide que la eche. Además, Carolina recibió en su casa a su hermano y el joven descubrió su pasado porno.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi condena; En un solo pie
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ángel, exguardia de seguridad en un penal, cumple condena por, supuestamente, violar a una presa. El hijo de Yancy padece cáncer de huesos y al amputarle una pierna, truncan sus sueños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fingió sus embarazos para sacarme dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Javier, un hombre casado, se arrepiente de haberse enamorado de Luz, quien se convirtió en su amante y le aseguró en tres ocasiones que estaba embarazada para recibir beneficios económicos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe arma su propio cártel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Con el dinero de Augusto y el apoyo de Brandon, Circe planea sacar a los Gaona del medio y convertirse en el cártel más poderoso del mundo. Isabel descubre quién es el novio de Marlene.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sueldo secreto; Dos pájaros de un tiro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana María quiere que Martin la compense salarialmente por pagarle menos durante dos años. Francisco pide que su exnuera desaloje el apartamento y le pague por incumplir el contrato de renta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos quitó la vida; Venganza de la ex
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Quiere ser la guardiana del amigo de su hijo para llenar el espacio que él dejó al morir. Escapa para evitar ser descubierto y se lesiona, ahora no puede practicar su pasión: el paracaidismo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de extravagantes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ellas los prefieren uniformados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Marinetas vs. naúfragos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Unas hermosas marineras de agua dulce están dispuestas a competir para conquistar el corazón de uno de los náufragos y encontrar a su pareja ideal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de flamenco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Jardín seco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María no puede darle un hijo a su esposo Pedro y el matrimonio se termina. Ella reniega de la vida y de su fe, pero Diego aparece en su vida y la reconcilia con el amor. Ambos reciben un milagro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me cobra la renta en mi cuarto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Karla afirma que Guillermo y Paola la quieren desalojar, aunque quiera pagar la renta. El joven busca una relación seria con su nueva inquilina, pero no puede sacarse de encima a la otra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Que se saque los ojos; Estafa embrujada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Camilo se ha quedado casi ciego y las conexiones nerviosas entre los ojos y el cerebro le provocan unos dolores insoportables, por los cuales tiene que tomar unos analgésicos tan fuertes que le han provocado adicción. Su esposa Carolina lo abandonó y no quiere regresar si no se saca los ojos. En otro caso, Vanessa le regaló su casa a Yenni supuestamente bajo los efectos de una brujería que le invalidaba su voluntad. Ahora quiere anular esa transferencia, pero Yenni alega que la casa ya es suya.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Baño subrentado; Matrimonio residente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En Internet, circula un video de Santiago en el baño gracias a una cámara oculta en la casa que alquiló. Por otro lado, Geovani y Nixon son pareja en un videojuego y se pelean por dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Que no me olvide
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Laura tiene problemas de memoria y su hija la califica de inútil. Entonces, ella se refugia en su otro hijo, Camilo. Cuando la situación se complica, descubren que se trata de un caso de Alzhéimer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Perdóname mamá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Delia decide asumir la responsabilidad por la falta de su hijo Adán. Delia debe ir a la cárcel y dejar solos a sus otros hijos Gabriel y Lisbeth. Tras su sacrificio, recibe la recompensa que tanto esperaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermanos por destino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos bebés fueron cambiados al nacer en el hospital. Santiago y Andrés, ahora adolescentes, se enfrentan a una verdad que altera sus vidas y la de sus padres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe arma su propio cártel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Con el dinero de Augusto y el apoyo de Brandon, Circe planea sacar a los Gaona del medio y convertirse en el cártel más poderoso del mundo. Isabel descubre quién es el novio de Marlene.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Preguntas no tan sencillas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana y Alberto quieren un viaje a la playa, pero la jaula es traicionera. Aunque Persis y Mauricio están entusiasmados, responder no siempre es fácil. A Roberto y Ana los traicionan los nervios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ella
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Simón se topa con un fantasma del pasado y Ella rompe sus reglas para cumplir un trato. En un día, buscan dar paz a una madre desesperada por saber el paradero de su hija.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fingió sus embarazos para sacarme dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Javier, un hombre casado, se arrepiente de haberse enamorado de Luz, quien se convirtió en su amante y le aseguró en tres ocasiones que estaba embarazada para recibir beneficios económicos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Así me conociste y no quiero cambiar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Emily exige que Adrián deje su trabajo como gigoló, él le recuerda que ese es su empleo desde que se conocieron y que debe confiar, pero su prima Brenda insiste en que termine con él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niño asesino; El yogurt de la discordia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un niño irrespetuoso y violento, es capaz de amenazar de muerte a su propia madre. Iveth prepara yogures con fluidos vaginales, Yailyn le da uno a su hija y la contagia de herpes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Voto de pobreza; Enganchado al streaming
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hermana de Pascual heredó dinero de su madre pero no quiere usarlo. La chica ha hecho un voto de pobreza porque se siente culpable de la muerte de su madre. Además, Melody es una chica que está enganchada a las series de TV por internet y se compró un accesorio que le permite ver su teléfono sin parar de hacer otras actividades en el hogar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No voy a criar a la hija de otra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras recibir a la hija de la amante de su esposo, Maricela se arrepiente de la decisión porque la joven muestra conducta agresiva y se niega a respetar las reglas de convivencia en su hogar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro de Diego y Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe le quita el negocio al cártel de los Gaona y, ahora, es ella quien pasará la droga a Estados Unidos. Diego teme que la maten y decide buscarla. El Corona encuentra a su hijo, Ricardo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Como anillo al dedo; Sacada de sangre mortal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La boda entre Jenifer y su novio se cancela, pero ella se niega a devolver el anillo de compromiso. Teresa contrata a John como enfermero, una inyección demostró que él es un farsante.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previa Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la Copa del Rey. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Barcelona y Atlético pelean por el primer puesto en la final de la Copa del Rey. Tras el 4-0 del Metropolitano, los colchoneros parten con una ventaja más que considerable. Pero el equipo azulgrana no se rinde y pretende emular remontadas pretéritas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Mallorca-Real Sociedad
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previa Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Real Sociedad-Athletic
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la Copa del Rey. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Real Sociedad-Athletic
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La Copa del Rey, el torneo con más historia del fútbol español, repite formato con eliminatorias a partido único. El Barcelona es el equipo con más títulos en su haber (32), seguido por el Athletic (24) y el Real Madrid (20). Los azulgranas defienden corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Real Sociedad-Athletic
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga Talking Football
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Eusebio Sacristán
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Una conversación con personalidades relacionadas con LaLiga para hablar de fútbol. El campeonato español cuenta con una nómina de estrellas que son referencia de este deporte. Es por eso, sin duda, que es uno de los más seguidos de todo el planeta.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Moreno vs. Kavanagh - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The first Mexican champion in UFC history headlines the promotion's return to Arena CDMX on Saturday, March 1 as Brandon “The Assassin Baby” Moreno steps in against Lone'er Kavanagh in a five-round flyweight contest. A two-time champion and perennial contender, Moreno earned a victory over Australian Steve Erceg in Mexico City in 2025, marking his first victory on home soil inside the Octagon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Bautista vs. Oliveira - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The first UFC Fight Night event of the year features a combustible pairing in the bantamweight division atop the marquee as Mario Bautista faces off with Vinicius “LokDog” Oliveira. Posted at No. 9 in the bantamweight division, Bautista remains one of the most underrated talents in the 135-pound weight class, boasting victories over Jose Aldo, Ricky Simon, and Patchy Mix.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ASTAF Sepaktakraw Asian Cup 2025 is set to take place from May 10 to May 18, 2025, at the prestigious Titiwangsa Indoor Stadium in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. This exciting tournament will showcase the best Sepaktakraw talent from across Asia, bringing together top teams and athletes to compete in a vibrant and dynamic environment.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 318: Holloway vs Poirier 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: It's a memorable night in New Orleans, Louisiana, when Lafayette native Dustin Poirier makes his final walk to the Octagon, hoping to go three for three against Max Holloway, with the BMF title on the line. This one for the history books and much more on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 18
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1003: Moreno vs Figueiredo 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 270 featured the third meeting between flyweight rivals Deiveson Figueiredo and Mexican champion Brandon Moreno. Relive their incredible battle like you've never seen it with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 325: Volkanovski vs. Lopes 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: On Sunday, February 1, UFC returns to Sydney Olympic Park, New South Wales, Australia for UFC 325 which will be headlined by a featherweight championship rematch between titleholder Alexander “The Great” Volkanovski and challenger Diego Lopes. Posted at No. 9 in the bantamweight division, Bautista remains one of the most underrated talents in the 135-pound weight class, boasting victories over Jose Aldo, Ricky Simon, and Patchy Mix.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LIGUE 1 TOP 10 SAVES - LIGUE 1 TOP 10 SAVES
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Shot stoppers at their fingertip-saving best. 10 of the best split-second reactions to certain goals from the 22/23 Ligue 1 season.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: ASTAF Sepaktakraw AsianCup Kuala Lumpur 2025 - Final (Thailand vs Malaysia) - Team Regu
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ASTAF Sepaktakraw Asian Cup 2025 is set to take place from May 10 to May 18, 2025, at the prestigious Titiwangsa Indoor Stadium in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. This exciting tournament will showcase the best Sepaktakraw talent from across Asia, bringing together top teams and athletes to compete in a vibrant and dynamic environment.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LIGUE 1 TOP 10 SAVES - LIGUE 1 TOP 10 SAVES
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Shot stoppers at their fingertip-saving best. 10 of the best split-second reactions to certain goals from the 22/23 Ligue 1 season.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 318: Holloway vs Poirier 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: It's a memorable night in New Orleans, Louisiana, when Lafayette native Dustin Poirier makes his final walk to the Octagon, hoping to go three for three against Max Holloway, with the BMF title on the line. This one for the history books and much more on UFC Reloaded
